positive: A whimsical, stylized composition featuring a deep-sea bioluminescent anglerfish floating among stylized coral formations and glowing jellyfish. The overall aesthetic is neo-vintage psychedelic art, rendered with thick, clean linework and bold color blocking. The anglerfish is the central focal point, illuminated by its own soft, cool glow, contrasted sharply against the deep indigo and royal purple abyss. Use high contrast to define the silhouettes of the coral and the fish's fins. Limited palette focusing on cyan, electric blue, lime green, and violet. Flat graphic illustration style suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing, with clear edges and no gradients. Cinematic, perfect composition.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, realistic photo, cinematic lighting, gradients, dirty, messy
